workflow: Before td review, the loop records done/remaining/decisions/uncertain in the handoff when td supports structured flags, and falls back to baking those sections into the review reason/comment when it does not; empty or auto-generated handoffs are rejected

steps.label: capability-detection
steps.result: structured_flags_supported=true via `td handoff --help` probe; flags={done,remaining,decisions,uncertain}=true; strategy=structured-handoff; review_safe=null (capability-only)

steps.label: structured-complete-handoff-accepted
steps.action: scratch issue with td handoff SCR --done/--remaining/--decision/--uncertain; run handoff_required.py --issue SCR --strict

steps.label: validation-failure-reproduced-td-afe55b
steps.action: python3 scripts/handoff_required.py --issue td-afe55b --strict (real closed validation issue: handoff.done/remaining/decisions/uncertain are all None in td show --json)
steps.result: counts all=0, missing=[done,remaining,decisions,uncertain], review_safe=false, exit 1 — the exact failure mode this issue exists to prevent

steps.label: validation-failure-reproduced-td-033e47
steps.result: review_safe=false, exit 1 — second validation handoff also caught

steps.label: fallback-stdin-and-singular-header
steps.result: both exit 0; singular 'Decision:' header counts as the decisions section

steps.label: handoff-json-override
steps.action: --structured true --handoff-json (raw object and full td-show dump)
steps.result: accepts both shapes; partial handoff (remaining empty) and all-None dump both rejected under --strict

steps.label: td-unavailable-fallback
steps.result: structured_flags_supported=false with 'td not found' warning; does not crash; loop falls back to reason-sections path

notes: UAT is CLI/functional: this issue adds a no-deps helper script + skill/config/README prose. There is no browser/UI workflow, login, or external service; the failure mode (td show --json handoff.done/remaining/decisions/uncertain all None on td-afe55b and td-033e47) is reproduced and rejected deterministically.
install.sh uses cp -R of the repo, so scripts/handoff_required.py ships with the skill; executable bit set, consistent with review_close_path.py, record_human_uat.py, and validate_config.py.
Section-to-flag mapping handled: td CLI flag is --decision (singular) while the td JSON field is decisions (plural); the fallback reason header matches both 'Decision:' and 'Decisions:'.
